title: ctenopteris lanigera
intro: Ctenopteris lanigera, also known as New Zealand fern or tree fern, is a native evergreen fern species found in New Zealand and Australia. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ctenopteris lanigera include the treatment of colds, coughs, and skin irritations, as well as its use as a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction for various medicinal purposes.
